## Checklist

- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes
- [ ] `npm run dist` succeeds and the built `.app` opens without crash
- [ ] I smoke-tested the UI change on a real install (`/Applications/ccIDE.app`)
- [ ] If this touches IPC / HTTP server / file writes, I noted the threat model below
- [ ] Screenshots / GIF attached if UI changed
